a: We offer 5 courses: AI/ML Bootcamp (₹12,999), Full Stack Web Development (₹10,999), Data Science Pro (₹11,499), Ethical Hacking & Cyber Security (₹8,999), and Cloud Computing with AWS & Azure (₹9,499). All include live classes, recordings, and a certificate.

Yes! The AI/ML Bootcamp, Full Stack Web Development, Data Science Pro, and Cloud Computing courses all come with dedicated placement support — mock interviews, resume reviews, and referrals to our hiring partners including TCS, Infosys, Razorpay, and top startups.
Absolutely. Every live class is recorded and uploaded within 24 hours. You get lifetime access to all recordings for the batch you join.

Yes — we offer a full refund if you request it within 7 days of your batch start date and have attended fewer than 3 classes. After 7 days, we evaluate on a case-by-case basis. Please contact our support team for specific situations.

q: How do I pay the course fee?
a: You can pay via UPI, debit/credit card, net banking, or EMI (available for courses above ₹9,000). For EMI, we partner with EarlySalary and Razorpay Pay Later — zero-cost EMI options are available for select banks.
Yes! EMI is available for AI/ML Bootcamp, Full Stack Web, Data Science Pro, and Cloud Computing. Monthly EMIs start from ₹3,000. We also offer a 10% upfront discount if you pay in full.

Our certificates are issued by EduFlow Institute, which is ISO 9001 certified. They are widely recognised in the industry and can be verified online via a QR code. Several alumni have used them successfully in job applications.
Our instructors are working professionals from top companies — Google, Razorpay, Flipkart, KPMG, and Swiggy. They bring real industry experience to every class, not just textbook knowledge.
Each course has 2-3 batches running at different times — morning (10 AM), evening (6-7 PM), and night (8-9 PM). You can pick the slot that suits you best when enrolling.

q: Can I switch batches after enrolling?
a: Yes, one free batch switch is allowed within the first 2 weeks of joining, subject to seat availability in your preferred batch. After that, switches are evaluated individually.

Yes! Every course includes dedicated doubt sessions — ranging from twice-weekly live Q&A (AI/ML Bootcamp) to daily async support with weekly live sessions (Full Stack). You'll never be stuck without help.

q: What are the prerequisites for the AI/ML Bootcamp?
a: None! The AI/ML Bootcamp is beginner-friendly. We start from Python basics. You just need curiosity and consistency. No prior coding experience is required.

q: Is the course mode online or offline?
a: Most courses are fully online. The AI/ML Bootcamp and Cloud Computing have hybrid batches (online + local lab sessions in select cities). Check the specific batch details when enrolling.

q: How long does each class last?
a: Each live class is 2 hours long. Plus there are weekly doubt sessions (1 hour) and recorded lectures you can revisit anytime. Total learning commitment is roughly 8-10 hours per week.

q: What happens if I miss a class?
a: No worries — every class is recorded and uploaded within 24 hours. You can also ask your questions in the next doubt session or the course WhatsApp group.

q: Is there a group/community for students?
a: Yes! Every batch has a WhatsApp group and a Discord server for peer support, resource sharing, and networking. Our alumni community has 2,000+ members actively helping each other.
We keep batches intentionally small — between 25-40 students depending on the course — so every student gets personal attention from the instructor.

We offer merit-based scholarships of up to 30% off for students from economically weaker backgrounds. We also run periodic promotional offers. Reach out to our team for current scholarship availability.

Absolutely. We specifically designed our evening and weekend batches for working professionals. Courses like Full Stack Web Development and Cloud Computing are very popular with professionals looking to upskill.

q: What is the duration of the Full Stack course?
a: The Full Stack Web Development course is 4 months long — the longest of our programs because it covers both frontend (React, Next.js) and backend (Node.js, MongoDB) comprehensively.
You can enroll right here in this chat! Just say 'I want to enroll' and I'll walk you through it in under 3 minutes. You'll get an instant WhatsApp confirmation once done.

q: What do I get after course completion?
a: Upon completion you receive: a verifiable digital certificate, access to the alumni network, placement support (for eligible courses), and lifetime access to all course materials.
No hidden fees. The price you see is the price you pay. Study materials, doubt sessions, recordings, and the certificate are all included. The only optional add-on is our 1-on-1 mentorship package.

q: Do you provide a laptop or any equipment?
a: We don't provide physical equipment, but all courses are designed to run on a basic laptop (4GB RAM, any OS). For cloud labs, we provide free sandbox credits for AWS and Azure.

q: Can I get a demo class before enrolling?
a: Yes! We offer a free 1-hour demo session for the AI/ML Bootcamp and Full Stack courses. Ask me to schedule one for you and I'll set it up.
Approved refunds are processed within 5-7 working days to your original payment method.

q: Is Data Science different from AI/ML?
a: Great question! Data Science focuses on analysing data, creating dashboards, and deriving business insights (SQL, Python, Tableau, Power BI). AI/ML goes deeper into building intelligent systems and models. Many students do Data Science first, then AI/ML.

q: Does the Cyber Security course prepare for CEH?
a: Yes, the Ethical Hacking & Cyber Security course is aligned with CEH (Certified Ethical Hacker) exam objectives. While we don't guarantee exam success, our syllabus covers all major CEH domains.
We offer a 7-day satisfaction guarantee. Attend the first 2-3 classes and if it's not the right fit, we'll refund your full fee — no questions asked.
You can chat with me anytime for instant answers, or if your issue needs human attention, just say 'I want to talk to a person' and I'll connect you with our support team within 2 hours.

q: Who is strictly eligible for this internship program?
a: This program is explicitly designed for ambitious college students, recent university graduates, and tech freshers who are looking to build practical, enterprise-level skills to secure their first professional roles.

q: Are the live projects actually utilized in the industry?
a: Yes. The project architectures provided in the curriculum directly mirror actual enterprise solutions. You will build software addressing real business problems, making your resulting portfolio highly attractive to corporate recruiters.

q: How exactly does the placement assistance phase work?
a: Upon successfully completing your final technical exam and earning the certificate, you gain secured access to our self-placement portal. This features exclusive fresher job openings, resume-building modules, and interview setups with our 50+ corporate hiring partners.
